# Interparts of Tulsa

> Independent auto repair shop at 3615 E 11th St in Tulsa, Oklahoma, on historic Route 66 since 1980. Honest diagnostics, up-front pricing, and a six-month guarantee on all labor. Not a chain, not a franchise.

- Address: 3615 E 11th St, Tulsa, OK 74112
- Phone: (918) 834-1800
- Hours: Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM
- Service area: Tulsa and Northeast Oklahoma

## Services

- AC/Heater repair: climate control diagnostics, leak detection, freon recharges, blower motor fixes, compressor replacements.
- Brakes and suspension: pad and rotor replacements, caliper servicing, shocks, struts, control arms, steering components.
- General repair: fluid leaks, belt replacements, full mechanical diagnostics.
- Engine repair: diagnostics, timing belts, head gaskets, oil leak resolution, minor to major rebuilds.
- Transmission repair: fluid flushes, clutch adjustments, torque converter fixes, assembly replacement and rebuilds.
- Tune-ups and maintenance: spark plugs, filter changes, fluid flushes, safety checks, mileage-interval preventative maintenance.

## What sets the shop apart

- Written diagnosis before any work begins — printed inspection sheets, not verbal estimates that shift.
- The quoted price is the price paid; no unexpected changes.
- The same certified technician works on your vehicle each visit; no rotating staff.
- Committed timelines, with proactive communication if a job runs over.
- Six-month guarantee on all labor: if the problem returns, it is fixed at no charge.
- Locally owned and locally staffed.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.interpartsoftulsa.com/): Single-page site covering services, shop history, customer reviews, location and hours, and the contact form.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://www.interpartsoftulsa.com/terms): Service estimates and authorizations, messaging submission, storage and mechanics liens.
